title: The US is clearing the runway for air taxis and supersonic jets
summary: The United States is moving to push two long-stalled aviation frontiers into commercial service at once, using federal rulemaking and White House pressure to speed electric air taxis and civil supersonic flight towards market.
caption: output/2026-07-21/the-us-is-clearing-the-runway-for-air-taxis-and-supersonic-jets.txt
